mapper.sql: id, promotion_name, promotion_type, rule, discount_value, start_time, end_time, status, product_ids, remark, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM promotion WHERE 1=1 AND promotion_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') AND status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM promotion ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO promotion (promotion_name, promotion_type, rule, discount_value, start_time, end_time, status, product_ids, remark, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{promotionName}, #{promotionType}, #{rule}, #{discountValue}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status}, #{productIds}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE promotion SET promotion_name=#{promotionName}, promotion_type=#{promotionType}, rule=#{rule}, discount_value=#{discountValue}, start_time=#{startTime}, end_time=#{endTime}, status=#{status}, product_ids=#{productIds}, remark=#{remark}, update_time=#{updateTime} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM promotion WHERE id IN #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE promotion SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM promotion WHERE status = 1 AND NOW() BETWEEN start_time AND end_time ORDER BY create_time DESC
